channel.title: Project on xuanjin
channel.description: Recent content in Project on xuanjin

item.title: Habit-Tracker-Vue
item.description: I, procrastinate a lot, like really a lot. I was thinking to have a habit tracking app to help myself to form a habit, BUT, I have been delaying on it. How ironic! Hahahah, I can hear your laugh through my screen. Even though there are things like Habitica exist, but that app is too busy, I love the RPG type, but I don’t need the app to be like that.
